name: chzzk
description: Personal Firefox WebExtension that installs tab-scoped session redirects for trusted CHZZK HLS quality requests.

scripts.build: npm run build:runtime && web-ext build --overwrite-dest --artifacts-dir dist --source-dir . --ignore-files .github .git .hermes docs node_modules package-lock.json package.json policy reg scripts src tests
scripts.lint:webext: web-ext lint --self-hosted --warnings-as-errors --source-dir . --ignore-files .github .git .hermes docs node_modules package-lock.json package.json policy reg scripts src tests
scripts.verify: npm run check:generated && npm run validate:manifest && npm run validate:project && npm run lint && npm run lint:webext && npm run test && npm run audit:deps && npm run build && npm run audit:package
